author: codex-tier2
summary: Capability inventory flagged stale receipts because evidence lived only on local commits.

insight: Running `teof bus_guard` or `hash_ledger guard` locally is not enough; CI only sees receipts that already live on main.
Store capability heartbeat outputs under docs/usage/capability-heartbeat and push them immediately so the next CI run inherits the proof.
Treat capability receipts like any other guard artifact: version them in git before asking automation to validate them.
